description: CLI can create, find, read, archive, and restore local handoff tasks
steps: Run `hando setup` or `npm run cli -- setup`
Run `hando save "Example task" --summary "Background, progress, next steps"`
Run `hando ls` and verify the task appears
Run `hando resume "Example"` and verify the task content is returned
Run `hando done <id>` and verify it moves to archive
Run `hando restore <id>` and verify it returns to active tasks

description: MCP server exposes save, resume, ls, get, archive, and restore tools
steps: Run `hando serve` or `npm run cli -- serve`
Connect with an MCP stdio client
Call `resume` with a natural language query
Call `archive` and `restore` for the saved task

description: Task storage stays Markdown-only and centered on task.md
steps: Verify no git.json or SQLite database is required
Verify current code status is written inside task.md
